comments_critique.summary: The discussion is limited, with only one comment emphasizing the infallibility of nature and the variability of human language and wisdom. There is no substantial debate or multiple viewpoints presented.

comments.author: mrwh
comments.text: Nature it selfe cannot erre: and as men abound in copiousnesse of language; so they become more wise, or more mad than ordinary
comments.analysis: The comment reflects a philosophical perspective on nature and human expression but lacks concrete evidence or engagement with the article's content.
